title: Zootrophion schenckii
intro: There is not enough information available on Zootrophion schenckii, a plant that is native to Ecuador.
taxonomy: Zootrophion schenckii is a species of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is classified as a genus within the subtribe Andropogoninae and tribe Cymbidieae. The family Orchidaceae is further divided into over 30,000 known species, making it the second-largest family of flowering plants. Zootrophion schenckii is native to the tropical regions of South America. Its classification as a species of orchid is well-established within the botanical community.
